title: Copilot Use Cases Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger copilot use cases foundations judgment so ai / automation work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Copilot Use Cases Foundations is a leverage point inside ai / automation. It supports the broader goal of workflow automation, copilots, agentic systems, and leverage through tooling.
coreConcepts: Copilot Use Cases Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good copilot use cases foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Copilot Use Cases Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
